# F&S Construction and Septic LLC

F&S Construction and Septic LLC is a local construction and septic company based in Shelton, Washington. The company serves Mason County and nearby communities including Belfair, Hoodsport, Union, Allyn, Thurston County, and Grays Harbor County.

Primary services:
- Custom home construction, additions, garages, framing, and project coordination
- Full home remodels, kitchens, bathrooms, and whole-home updates
- Roof replacement, siding, decking, exterior repairs, and storm damage work
- Septic inspections, septic pumping coordination, septic repairs, septic installations, diagnostics, and maintenance guidance
- Commercial renovations and general property improvements

Contact:
- Phone: 360-229-1220
- Email: info@fsconstructionseptic.com
- Address: 50 W. Sentry Drive, Shelton, WA 98584
